message:
test(cli): add robot tx contract tests and fix compensated->rolled_back terminology

Fix existing partial-failure test to expect "rolled_back" instead of
"compensated" for final_state. Add 5 new robot-mode JSON envelope
contract tests: plan, partial failure with compensation, pause-suspended
commit, kill-switch safe-mode, and rollback failure then recovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
